mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.trip_id, r.type, r.content, r.diary_title, r.weather, r.temperature, r.visibility, r.recorded_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.id AS place_id, p.name AS place_name, p.address AS place_address, p.latitude AS place_latitude, p.longitude AS place_longitude, p.created_at AS place_created_at, c.id AS cat_id, c.name AS cat_name, c.color AS cat_color, c.icon AS cat_icon, c.is_default AS cat_is_default, ri.id AS img_id, ri.image_url AS img_url, ri.is_representative AS img_is_representative, ri.order_index AS img_order_index
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM record r LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN record_image ri ON r.id = ri.record_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.recorded_at DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM record r LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN record_image ri ON r.id = ri.record_id WHERE r.id = #{id} ORDER BY ri.order_index ASC

SELECT
FROM record r LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN record_image ri ON r.id = ri.record_id WHERE r.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY r.recorded_at ASC, r.created_at ASC, ri.order_index ASC

SELECT r.id, r.type, p.name AS place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, ( SELECT ri.image_url FROM record_image ri WHERE ri.record_id = r.id ORDER BY ri.is_representative DESC, ri.order_index ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS representative_image_url, DATE_FORMAT(r.recorded_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS recorded_at, r.trip_id, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, c.icon AS category_icon FROM record r LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND p.latitude IS NOT NULL AND p.longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.recorded_at DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.type, p.name AS place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, ( SELECT ri.image_url FROM record_image ri WHERE ri.record_id = r.id ORDER BY ri.is_representative DESC, ri.order_index ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS representative_image_url, DATE_FORMAT(r.recorded_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS recorded_at, r.trip_id, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, c.icon AS category_icon FROM record r LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id WHERE r.trip_id = #{tripId} AND p.latitude IS NOT NULL AND p.longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.recorded_at ASC, r.created_at ASC

SELECT
FROM record r INNER JOIN share_member sm ON r.user_id = sm.user_id LEFT JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN record_image ri ON r.id = ri.record_id WHERE sm.share_group_id = #{groupId} AND r.visibility = 'SHARED' ORDER BY r.recorded_at DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) FROM record r INNER JOIN share_member sm ON r.user_id = sm.user_id WHERE sm.share_group_id = #{groupId} AND r.visibility = 'SHARED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != ''
